types:type.name: auto_84bb64a3-2536-49c9-98dc-6d3f5ce0678f_Output-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_84bb64a3_2536_49c9_98dc_6d3f5ce0678f_Output_Payload = { dateTime: String, data?: {| customer: {| shippingCity?: String, website?: String, accountName: String, lastModifiedDate?: String, shippingStreet?: String, accountType?: String, externalId?: String, industry?: String, billingState?: String, shippingPostalCode?: String, accountNumber?: String, ownerId?: String, phoneNumber?: String, createdDate?: String, billingStreet?: String, billingPostalCode?: String, shippingCountry?: String, billingCountry?: String, shippingState?: String, salesforceAccountId?: String, billingCity?: String, activeFlag?: Boolean |} {"label": "Customer", "description": "Account record retrieved from Salesforce."} |} {"label": "Salesforce Customer Single Get Data", "description": "Payload representing a single Salesforce customer record."}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.

Detail messages provide additional actionable information such as validation failures, skipped
records, unsupported values, or other context that helps the client understand the outcome
without changing the top-level response message.
", "label": "Response detail"}> {"description": "Optional list of structured detail messages that provide additional context,
such as validation failures, warnings, or informational notes.
"}, message: String, status: "SUCCESS" | "ERROR" | "WARNING", _?: Any } {"label": "Get Salesforce Umbrella Customer Response", "description": "Standard API response envelope with a single customer retrieval payload."}

types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_3c273a62_1423_4662_a951_112de4004cd2_Output_Payload = { dateTime: String, data?: {| recordCount: Number, customers: Array<{| shippingCity?: String, website?: String, accountName: String, lastModifiedDate?: String, shippingStreet?: String, accountType?: String, externalId?: String, industry?: String, billingState?: String, shippingPostalCode?: String, accountNumber?: String, ownerId?: String, phoneNumber?: String, createdDate?: String, billingStreet?: String, billingPostalCode?: String, shippingCountry?: String, billingCountry?: String, shippingState?: String, salesforceAccountId?: String, billingCity?: String, activeFlag?: Boolean |} {"description": "Salesforce-aligned representation of an account record exposed by a System API.
Field names are human-readable but remain aligned to Salesforce Account concepts rather
than the enterprise canonical customer model.
", "label": "Salesforce Customer"}> {"label": "Customers", "description": "Account records retrieved from Salesforce."} |} {"label": "Salesforce Customer Get Data", "description": "Payload representing multiple Salesforce customer records."}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.

such as validation failures, warnings, or informational notes.
"}, message: String, status: "SUCCESS" | "ERROR" | "WARNING", _?: Any } {"description": "Standard API response envelope with a customer retrieval payload.", "label": "Get Salesforce Umbrella Customers Response"}

than the enterprise canonical customer model.
", "label": "Salesforce Customer"}> {"description": "Collection of Salesforce customer records.", "label": "Salesforce Customer Collection"}

records fail processing.
